creator: pjfloyd@wanadoo.fr
text:
This is a duplicate of https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=277515

The  same things apply

1. Please use devel/valgrind-devel
2. I already fixed the build upstream over 6 weeks ago
3. Just hacking the configure script isn't enough. I also expect no new failures in the regression tests.
4. I'll fix it if I start getting package build failure notifications, otherwise I'd rather wait for the release of Valgrind 2.23 toward the end of April.
